title: neocleome
intro: Neocleome, a member of the Bignoniaceae family, is a flowering plant native to tropical regions. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been shown to be effective in treating various health conditions. The plant's extracts have been found to have health benefits such as reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and supporting cardiovascular health. Neocleome is often prepared in herbal tea, tincture, or capsule form, making it easily accessible for those looking to harness its medicinal properties.
